message:
Strengthen e2e assertions for resolved paths and sync import idempotency

Assert that sync --import-only does not rewrite issues.jsonl, catching
potential bugs where import silently re-serializes and alters the file.
Use resolved database paths from 'br where --json' in workspace failure
replay tests instead of hardcoded beads.db, fixing false passes for
workspaces with custom metadata paths or redirects. Tighten custom-path
fixture assertions to match full resolved paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
